name: Eastern Asturian
notes: Eastern Asturian (Asturianu oriental). Spoken in the eastern parishes of Asturias bordering Cantabria. KEY DIALECTAL FEATURES: (1) Incipient yeísmo: /ʎ/ shows variation with [ʝ], particularly among younger and urban speakers — influence from Cantabrian Spanish and prestige Castilian. (2) Some phonological convergence with Castilian. (3) Otherwise very similar to Central Asturian. Source: Cano González (2009), Penny (2002).
